advisoryWorkflowRuns.name: Dependency Audit
advisoryWorkflowRuns.finding: GitHub reported default-branch vulnerability alerts during push/fetch operations. This is visible at workflow/security-advisory level but was not a required merge check for PR #3566. Track separately from required-check pass/fail wording.

skippedWorkflowRuns.name: coverage
skippedWorkflowRuns.reason: Optional/advisory coverage surfaces are recorded separately from required merge checks.

staleWorkflowRuns.name: gate
staleWorkflowRuns.resolution: Review threads were resolved, then an unchanged empty amend refreshed the head to 50dce20e392083fce044077ca24a9e12b2810ee1 so required checks could be evaluated on a clean rollup.

localVerification.command: pnpm -s exec vitest run tests/scripts/domain-presets.test.ts --reporter dot
localVerification.note: Domain preset renderer regression tests passed: 1 file / 6 tests.
Local verify-lite passed with pre-existing lint findings remaining warn-only under the baseline.

auditNotes.message: Completion comments must say required checks passed, not that every repository workflow or advisory surface was clean when advisory findings remain visible.
Completion audit evidence is report-only. It records closeout state and does not approve, merge, or waive human review.

collectionBoundaries.approvalAuthority: human maintainers and repository branch protection remain the approval authority
collectionBoundaries.requiredCheckSource: captured PR #3566 required-check rollup after final head refresh
collectionBoundaries.advisoryFindingSource: captured workflow/security advisory observations and stale-run evidence
collectionBoundaries.reportOnlyReason: The audit distinguishes closeout evidence classes; it does not add a policy-gate block condition.
